title: DElirium prediCtIon in the intenSIve Care Unit: Head to Head comparisON of Two Delirium Prediction Models

metadata.brief_title: DElirium prediCtIon in the intenSIve Care Unit: Head to Head comparisON of Two Delirium Prediction Models
metadata.brief_summary: Currently, two ICU delirium prediction models are available: the PRE-DELIRIC model and the early prediction model (E-PRE-DELRIC). However, the use of these prediction models is not yet implemented as standard in clinical practice, as it is unknown which delirium prediction model can best be used to predict delirium in ICU patients.Therefore the main aim of this study is to compare the performance of the PRE-DELIRIC model and the E-PRE-DELRIC model.
